title: ctenitis effusa var. divergens
intro: Ctenitis effusa var. divergens, also known as the divergent ctenitis fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antiviral, and anti-bacterial activities. Ctenitis effusa var. divergens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can be dried and used in herbal capsules or supplements for its medicinal properties.
